elements.original_description: A closed piggy bank with a padlock on it, sitting on a pure white background. The piggy bank is blue with a coin slot on top and a small label that reads 'Savings' in a playful font. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: A professional 2D minimalist icon of a blue ceramic piggy bank with a small silver padlock attached to its front, sitting isolated on a pure white background. The piggy bank has a coin slot on its top and a small, clear label with the word 'Savings' written in a playful, sans-serif font. Clean flat vector art style, high contrast, sharp edges, no shading or gradients, no shadows, no text or letters besides the label, no watermarks.
